race.comment: AMPING LASS (8) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.75 lengths in second over 1000m at Sandown-Lakeside. Beautifully placed and will keep improving for a leading yard. Has an awkward gate but keeps Nolen and with average luck will be tough to beat. THINKING OF GERTY (4) led and just missed in a 66 over 1000m at Donald first-up. She's back on track and has strong metro form in the CV. Goes well second-up and Currie can manage the sticky gate. THAT'SMONEYBROTHER (5) showed plenty in her maiden campaign and looked a run short when just beaten first-up at Yarra Valley as a $3.2F. Has been freshened and has won a jumpout since. The gate is against, but he won his Maiden here second-up and quick improvement is on the cards. DOCUMENTARY (3) has also jumped out since a solid resumption in a 70 at Echuca. Has the inside gate and has also won second-up. His best form would see him very competitive.
